reasoning: XLK +0.61% (tech leadership above 0.5% threshold) paired with XLF +0.46% and XLE +0.46% = classic risk-on sector rotation into open. All three major sectors positive and aligned. Tech leading SPY by 28bp (0.61% vs 0.33%) indicates tech-driven rally, not broad-based — watch for breadth fade if XLE momentum doesn't pick up. VIX rising +2.71% alongside risk-on sectors = conviction move. Bullish bias on sector internals, medium confidence due to tech concentration.
key_observations: XLK: +0.61% — clear tech leadership, exceeds 0.5% risk-on threshold
XLF: +0.46% — financials positive but sub-threshold; yield-curve supportive
XLE: +0.46% — energy aligned with risk-on, no defensive rotation
overall rotation: risk_on — all sectors up, tech concentrated, SPY lagging sector strength
